email.description: The email address of the recipient.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the push notification was sent.

campaignId.description: The identifier of the campaign associated with the push send.

templateId.description: The identifier of the template used for the push notification.

messageId.description: The unique identifier of the message.

channelId.description: The identifier of the channel through which the push was sent.

messageTypeId.description: The identifier of the message type.

contentId.description: The identifier of the content used in the push notification.

platformEndpoint.description: The platform endpoint for the push notification delivery.

transactionalData.description: Transactional data associated with the push send.

catalogLookupCount.description: The number of catalog lookups performed.

catalogCollectionCount.description: The number of catalog collections used.

productRecommendationCount.description: The number of product recommendations included.

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether push notifications are enabled for the user.

documentCreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was created.

documentUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was last updated.
